title: Restriction endonuclease reactions
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c345t","text":"This protocol is used to having restriction endonuclease reactions based on endonuclease by NEB.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add the following reagents to a PCR tube (e.g. 50μl) on ice. A B 1 Restriction Enzyme 10 units is sufficient, generally 1 µl is used 2 DNA 1μl 3 10 x NEBuffer 5μl 4 ddH2O To 50μl
Incubate at 37℃ in water bath for 1 hour.
Stop the reaction by heat inactivation. Temperature and time for inactivation depends on the enzyme.
Use electrophoresis to confirm if correct construct was present.
creator: Shuning Guo
